subcodes.title: The Transference of Matter across the Kingdoms of Existence
subcodes.first_line: Throughout this endless universe the greatest means for the progress and renewal of existence is that all things are eaters and eaten.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در کائنات نامتناهیه اعظم وسائط تجدد وجود بلکه ترقی قضیۀ اکل و مأکول است
subcodes.subjects: @law of transformation and change, @composition and decomposition, @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being
